inputs.label: Total Production (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of finished goods produced in the reporting period (ISO 14051 material flow).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weight of finished goods produced in the reporting period (ISO 14051 material flow).

inputs.label: Waste (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of food waste generated (including trim, spoilage, overproduction, and expired product).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weight of food waste generated (including trim, spoilage, overproduction, and expired product).

inputs.label: Selling Price per kg
inputs.businessContext: Average revenue per kg of finished product sold (net of discounts).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average revenue per kg of finished product sold (net of discounts).

inputs.label: Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Total variable cost per kg (raw materials, labor, energy, packaging).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total variable cost per kg (raw materials, labor, energy, packaging).

inputs.label: Waste Disposal Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost to dispose of waste (landfill, composting, incineration).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost to dispose of waste (landfill, composting, incineration).

inputs.label: Rework Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of production that requires rework (Lean Six Sigma defect rate).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of production that requires rework (Lean Six Sigma defect rate).

inputs.label: Labor Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average fully loaded labor cost per hour (including benefits).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average fully loaded labor cost per hour (including benefits).

inputs.label: Rework Hours per kg
inputs.businessContext: Average labor hours required to rework one kg of product.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average labor hours required to rework one kg of product.

inputs.label: Storage Cost per kg per Day
inputs.businessContext: Cost to store one kg of product per day (WERC warehousing metrics).

label_i18n.en: Storage Cost per kg per Day

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost to store one kg of product per day (WERC warehousing metrics).

inputs.label: Average Storage Days
inputs.businessContext: Average number of days waste is held before disposal or rework.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of days waste is held before disposal or rework.

inputs.label: Waste Type
inputs.businessContext: Primary category of waste (ISO 14051 waste classification).

businessContext_i18n.en: Primary category of waste (ISO 14051 waste classification).

inputs.label: Include Hidden Costs (Energy, Water, Overhead)
inputs.businessContext: If true, allocates a portion of fixed overhead to waste (activity-based costing).

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, allocates a portion of fixed overhead to waste (activity-based costing).

rules.message: Rework percentage must be between 0 and 100.
Selling price should be greater than or equal to cost per kg for positive margin.

thresholds.message: Waste percentage exceeds 10% - investigate root cause (Six Sigma DMAIC).
Margin loss exceeds 15% - immediate action required (Lean waste reduction).
Rework percentage above 5% - consider process capability improvement (Cp/Cpk).

formulas.label: Waste Percentage
formulas.description: Percentage of total production that becomes waste.

formulas.label: Direct Material Loss
formulas.description: Direct cost of raw materials in waste.

formulas.label: Lost Revenue
formulas.description: Revenue that would have been generated if waste were sold.

formulas.label: Rework Labor Cost
formulas.description: Labor cost incurred due to rework.

formulas.label: Storage Cost of Waste
formulas.description: Cost to store waste before disposal or rework.

formulas.label: Hidden Overhead Allocation
formulas.description: Allocated overhead (energy, water, facility) proportional to waste volume (ABC method).

formulas.label: Total Margin Loss
formulas.formula: direct_material_loss + lost_revenue + disposal_cost + rework_labor_cost + storage_cost_waste + hidden_overhead_allocation
formulas.description: Primary result: total financial impact of food waste on margin.

formulas.label: Margin Loss Percentage
formulas.description: Percentage of total revenue lost due to waste.

primary.label: Total Margin Loss
primary.description: Total financial loss from food waste (direct + hidden costs).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Energy Embedded in Waste
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Energy consumed to produce wasted product (kWh).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Water Embedded in Waste
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Water used in production of wasted product (liters).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Carbon Footprint of Waste
hiddenLossDrivers.description: CO2 emissions from production and disposal of waste (kg CO2e).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Labor Opportunity Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Value of labor time that could have been used for value-added work.

suggestedActions.action: Implement Lean 5S and visual management to reduce overproduction and trim waste.
Conduct root cause analysis (Fishbone / 5 Whys) for spoilage and expired waste.
Optimize inventory turnover using FIFO and demand forecasting to reduce expired waste.
Train operators on standardized work and error-proofing (Poka-Yoke) to reduce rework.
Explore waste-to-value opportunities (composting, anaerobic digestion, donation).

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Score
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Confidence in the accuracy of inputs (based on completeness and validation). Default 85% if all inputs provided.
